# balena_image_env_var (Resource)

Manages an environment variable scoped to a specific release_image.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "balena_image_env_var" "node_env" {
  release_image_id = 789012
  name             = "NODE_ENV"
  value            = "production"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Environment variable name.
- `release_image_id` (Number) Numeric ID of the parent release_image (release + image pair).
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Environment variable value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier assigned by the Balena API.
